search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: How to Check Someone's Breathing Rate (Rate of Respiration) 1 Count the breaths. Breathing is measured in breaths per minute or bpm. To get an accurate measurement, the person must be at rest. This means she is not breathing faster than usual due to exercising. She should be still for at least 10 minutes before you count her breaths. [3] [4]Have the person s
Decision_Reason: The page discusses how to measure breathing rate, not strategies or guidance to improve athletic performance.
